description: Baseline: AdamW 3e-4, XSA-all, EngramLite, 200 iters, 30.7M params. Loss stuck at random init (1.6M tokens insufficient to show learning). Establishes timing: 2s/step on M4.

Muon (NS5 lr=0.025) + QK_GAIN=4.0 + LEAKY_SLOPE=0.3. 200 iters. Loss 6.75→6.63 (learning signal!), AdamW was flat at 6.93. val_bpb 9.623 vs 10.007 baseline (-0.384 improvement). 2.62s/step. Clear Muon win.
Turbo-Muon (Polar Express 4-iter + AOL preconditioning). 500 iters. val_bpb 9.366 vs 9.623 (-0.257). Train loss 6.73→6.49. BUT 1233s run time (>10min limit) due to EMA eval every step. Fix needed.
LEAKY_SLOPE=0.75 (vs 0.3). Turbo-Muon unchanged. 500 iters. val_bpb 9.354 vs 9.366 (-0.012). Train loss 6.73->6.48. PR #1135 uses 0.75, positive direction confirmed.

Coprime loader v1 (BAD stride=n/2): alternates between 2 positions only. Phase=53M hit low-entropy data (train loss 4.69 vs normal 6.73). val_bpb 9.919 WORSE than baseline. Bug: stride should be n//total_steps not n//2.

Coprime loader v2 (correct stride=200001≈n/500). Neutral local result (9.356 vs 9.354 baseline, within noise). Train loss 6.77→6.48, same as sequential. Expected: no local improvement (100M shard too large for 500-step coverage). Ready for H100 deployment where full shard coverage matters.
